cit.basis: Flat 18% profit (corporate income) tax on taxable profit of resident entities.
cit.note: Administered by the State Revenue Committee (SRC / Petekamutner).

turnover_tax.note: Turnover tax replaces profit tax and VAT for qualifying taxpayers below a revenue threshold; rates vary by activity.

micro_business.note: Micro-business regime exempts qualifying small taxpayers below a lower revenue threshold from profit and turnover tax.

personal_income_tax.note: Flat personal income tax on employment income (approximate; being phased down in some years).

sources.name: State Revenue Committee of the Republic of Armenia (Petekamutner)

metadata.note: Rates in this pack are AI-estimated and MUST be verified against the State Revenue Committee (petekamutner.am) before any production tax filing.

official_sources.name: State Revenue Committee of the Republic of Armenia (Petekamutner)

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Simplified turnover/micro-business regimes, deductions, WHT, relief, and filing rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
